creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
I have tried this yesterday (to remove before "make" remove the .orig
files).
e.g.

===>  Patching for open-vm-tools-10.1.0,2

=> FreeBSD patch patch-base64rename failed to apply cleanly.
